note: HOEPA §1026.32(a)(1) three-trigger test. Known constants: APR trigger = APOR+6.5pp (first lien standard), APOR+8.5pp (subordinate or dwelling <$50k); points-and-fees = 5% of loan / $1,380 floor (2026, FR 2025-22773); PP trigger: >36 months or >2% of prepaid amount. golden_hash empty until golden-parity --update.

vectors.name: hoepa_apr_trigger_first_lien
vectors.description: First-lien loan: APR 12.5%, APOR 5.5% => spread 7pp > 6.5pp first-lien threshold. APR trigger fires. Known constant: APOR+6.5pp for first-lien per §1026.32(a)(1)(i)(A).

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1026.32(a)(1) HOEPA high-cost mortgage trigger test. APR trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(i). Points-and-fees trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(ii). Prepayment penalty trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(iii).
output_payload.consumes: art-220 (lookup_reg_z_thresholds) supplies the HOEPA threshold table (table: hoepa). This node pins the same values for local deterministic compute.
output_payload.note: HOEPA restrictions apply if ANY trigger is met. APOR must be supplied by caller from FFIEC weekly APOR table (ffiec.gov/ratespread). For HPML escrow requirement: use art-235 (test_hpml_escrow).

vectors.name: hoepa_points_fees_trigger
vectors.description: First-lien loan $400k, points-and-fees $25k: 5% limit = $20k. Points-and-fees exceed limit by $5k. Points-fees trigger fires; APR spread 2pp < 6.5pp (no APR trigger).

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1026.32(a)(1) HOEPA high-cost mortgage trigger test. APR trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(i). Points-and-fees trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(ii). Prepayment penalty trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(iii).
output_payload.consumes: art-220 (lookup_reg_z_thresholds) supplies the HOEPA threshold table (table: hoepa). This node pins the same values for local deterministic compute.
output_payload.note: HOEPA restrictions apply if ANY trigger is met. APOR must be supplied by caller from FFIEC weekly APOR table (ffiec.gov/ratespread). For HPML escrow requirement: use art-235 (test_hpml_escrow).

vectors.name: empty_input_finite
vectors.description: Empty inputs: all thresholds zero, no triggers fire, is_high_cost=false. Verifies empty-input finite invariant.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: 12 CFR §1026.32(a)(1) HOEPA high-cost mortgage trigger test. APR trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(i). Points-and-fees trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(ii). Prepayment penalty trigger: §1026.32(a)(1)(iii).
output_payload.consumes: art-220 (lookup_reg_z_thresholds) supplies the HOEPA threshold table (table: hoepa). This node pins the same values for local deterministic compute.
output_payload.note: HOEPA restrictions apply if ANY trigger is met. APOR must be supplied by caller from FFIEC weekly APOR table (ffiec.gov/ratespread). For HPML escrow requirement: use art-235 (test_hpml_escrow).
